pipeline.name: Research
pipeline.output: Research question, search strategy, bibliography, source verification, synthesis.

pipeline.name: Write
pipeline.output: Draft structure, argument map, figures, manuscript sections, citation plan.

pipeline.name: Integrity
pipeline.output: Blocking reference, claim, data, and failure-mode verification before review.

pipeline.name: Review
pipeline.output: Editorial review, domain review, methodology review, and adversarial critique.

pipeline.name: Revise
pipeline.output: Traceable response plan, revised draft, unresolved limitation log.

pipeline.name: Re-review
pipeline.output: Focused verification of revisions and residual issues.

pipeline.name: Final integrity
pipeline.output: Fresh verification pass before formatting and publication.

pipeline.name: Finalize
pipeline.output: Format conversion, final manuscript package, optional PDF workflow.

pipeline.name: Process summary
pipeline.output: Human-AI collaboration record, decisions, limitations, and audit trail.

skills.name: Deep Research
skills.description: 13-agent research team for Socratic guidance, PRISMA reviews, source verification, synthesis, bias checks, and monitoring.

skills.name: Academic Paper
skills.description: 12-agent paper writing workflow with style calibration, writing quality checks, revision, citation conversion, and disclosure support.

skills.name: Academic Paper Reviewer
skills.description: 7-agent multi-perspective peer review with quality rubrics, editorial synthesis, methodology focus, re-review, and calibration.

skills.name: Academic Pipeline
skills.description: 10-stage orchestrator with adaptive checkpoints, mandatory integrity gates, two-stage review, material passport, and process summary.
